name: The Betrayer's Kiss
oracleText:
Target creature gets -3/-3 until end of turn.
If that creature dies this turn, create a Treasure token.
flavorText: "Judas, betrayest thou the Son of man with a kiss?" — Luke 22:48
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mana, colors, and mechanics were added, but final tuning remains pending. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses James Tissot's "The Kiss of Judas" via Wikimedia Commons.

classics.license: Public domain; Brooklyn Museum Commons upload marked with no known restrictions.
classics.creditText: James Tissot, The Kiss of Judas
classics.sourceNotes: An exact betrayal scene fits the card directly.
